ksa_text: Skill in developing AI system documentation and technical specifications, including creating model cards, system cards, datasheets, documenting system context and intended use, and producing documentation meeting regulatory compliance standards for EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although AI Governance is an edge domain for the VP Data Engineering, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.629) and conceptual alignment to include at the vp level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (AI Governance), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.629). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the VP Data Engineering versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act (Article 9), and OECD AI Principles confirm AI governance as a critical competency for responsible AI leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with AI Governance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for VP Data Engineering.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain AI Governance skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.629. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the VP Data Engineering.
